description: Autonomous v3 build: real snapshot + cut CI minutes, Supabase Auth (email+TOTP), homepage/draft/waiver/trades/player/header/footer pages, VORP + Monte Carlo models, SEO/mobile/perf polish. Each story is one Ralph segment dispatched to a dedicated subagent that reads docs/phases/v3/handoffs/<epicId>.md and the injected upstream .done.md notes. Segment sub-branch off v3; commit/push/PR per epic; never touch main.

userStories.title: Epic 1 — Pipeline minutes cut
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the daily ETL workflow to run in fewer minutes via caching/conditionals.
acceptanceCriteria: etl_daily.yml caches pip + nflverse data; history_ingest gated to run-once-then-skip (re-run on workflow_dispatch / new season)
Skip steps when upstream unchanged; ubuntu-latest kept; no 11-season backtest in daily CI
Pipeline idempotent; npm run build / tsc --noEmit / vitest green where applicable
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: done — PR #27, merged to v3. ETL caches pip+season marker; history gated --skip-if-cached (cron once-then-skip, new-season busts cache, dispatch forces). ubuntu-latest, idempotent, assert test.

userStories.title: Epic 3.1 — Publish real snapshot
userStories.description: As a user, I want the players page to show a real published snapshot, not the empty state.
acceptanceCriteria: value_engine_run.py --engine vorp then publish_snapshot.py run against live Supabase (source frontend/.env.local; never print/commit keys)
Manifest + snapshot confirmed reading on the players page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: done — real vorp snapshot live on Supabase (manifest default:vorp → 4254 players); players page renders it (Playwright-verified, empty state gone). build/tsc/vitest/bundle-audit green. Re-publish needs SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (CI-only, not in local .env); snapshot already current so goal met.

userStories.title: Epic 6 — Login page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to log in via Supabase Auth with forgot-password and optional TOTP 2FA.
acceptanceCriteria: Login route; header profile icon links to login; forgot-password via email OTP/reset
TOTP 2FA opt-in at sign-in (no SMS provider; SMS interface stubbed)
Builds on v2.5 accounts/credential_vault/multi_league; RLS+policies on any new table; no secrets in client bundle
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: done — PR #29, merged to v3. TOTP 2FA opt-in (/auth/2fa enroll + /auth/2fa/verify step-up) on existing Supabase Auth; header profile-icon entry; no new tables (Supabase owns MFA factors); SMS seam stubbed at lib/auth/sms.ts. build/tsc/vitest(125)/axe green.

userStories.title: Epic 7 — Signup page
userStories.description: As a new user, I want to sign up with bot defense and encrypted sensitive fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Signup page (First, Last, Email, Phone, Password, Confirm) linked from login
Replicate ../portfolio-website hCaptcha + Vercel BotID + rate-limit on auth routes
App-layer envelope-encrypt phone/credentials client->server (reuse lib/crypto + pipeline/vault.py); passwords hashed server-side, never decrypted
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: done — PR #30, merged to v3. Signup via POST /api/auth/signup (rate-limit + hCaptcha/honeypot-math fallback + envelope-encrypted phone -> accounts.phone_encrypted). tsc/vitest(134)/build/axe green. Vercel BotID = gated no-op stub (deploy-only), upgrade path in 7.done.md.

userStories.title: Epic 3.2 — Shared tooltip primitive
userStories.description: As a user, I want one consistent opaque tooltip across the deck and player table.
acceptanceCriteria: One opaque theme-aware tooltip reused on deck + PlayerTable.tsx
Enter/leave clears on row change even when overlaying next row; meaningful content
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Epic 2 — Homepage
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want correct copy, a card carousel, shared tooltips, and a Rive background.
acceptanceCriteria: app/page.tsx:108 'seven tools' -> 'six tools'; equal-size cards in CSS scroll-snap carousel (no dep)
Opaque shared tooltip primitive (Epic 3.2)
Rive blueprint bg animation via RiveInstrument.tsx, right-weighted, reduced-motion static fallback; if Rive authoring blocked ship static fallback + log
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Epic 4 — Draft (unauth)
userStories.description: As a drafter, I want a league-rules editor, bye weeks, schedule import, and fixed auto-draft.
acceptanceCriteria: League-rules editor pre-draft, default superflex 2QB; import rules from existing league
Bye weeks column from imported NFL schedule (nflverse/Sleeper); soft VORP penalty on K/DEF
Root-cause-fix auto-draft freeze (verify after Epic 3.1); Sleeper ID moved Manual->Sleeper Live; full-analysis = full detail page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a waiver page with an all-NFL-players RSS feed.
acceptanceCriteria: RSS = all-NFL-players feed

userStories.title: Epic 10 — Trades (unauth)
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a trade calculator with fast player search and RSS.
acceptanceCriteria: Trade calculator w/ fast in-memory client index (trie/fuzzy), bloom pre-filter as labeled nicety (small N)
Position + NFL-team dropdown filters; RSS all-NFL, refocus to players-in-trade on submit

userStories.title: Epic 12 — Models (VORP + Monte Carlo)
userStories.description: As an analyst, I want backtested VORP + net-new Monte Carlo season-distribution models, run locally and uploaded online.
acceptanceCriteria: 12.1 VORP backtest 2015-2025
12.2 Monte Carlo (net-new): season-long fantasy-point distributions per player (floor/ceiling/boom-bust), validated vs actual 2015-2025
Backtests run locally (not daily CI); local run automated to upload results to Supabase; optional manual-dispatch workflow; idempotent upload
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.description: As a user, I want the league page gated behind auth with return-to redirect.
acceptanceCriteria: League page behind auth middleware; unauth -> redirect to login with return-to

acceptanceCriteria: Leagues: connect up to 3 via Sleeper+ESPN (LeagueImport.tsx + multi_league tables, RLS per auth.uid())
Draft(auth): league toggle instead of import selector; Waiver(auth): League Selector + RSS scope toggle default free-agents
Trades(auth): League Selector + team-focused RSS + multi-select trade calculator above suggestions, refocus on submit; Settings: change pw/email/phone, toggle 2FA, delete account
RLS+policies on new tables; no secrets in client bundle

acceptanceCriteria: Flesh out from existing pipeline data (weekly logs, splits, trends, VORP + Monte Carlo outputs, Sparkline.tsx)
More stats, no new data source
